messaging_angles: Gamification and rewards (Missions, Diamonds, Mystery Boxes)
Crypto rewards card with boosted rates
Large user base social proof (100M+ users)
messaging_analysis.buy_crypto_framing: soft — focuses on 'building portfolio' and 'seamlessly' rather than direct buying prompts; emphasis on ecosystem features (cards, rewards, trading tools) over direct crypto purchase urgency
messaging_analysis.fees_messaging: Completely absent — no mention of fees, pricing, or cost advantages in any ad
messaging_analysis.simplicity_messaging: Moderate — phrases like 'seamlessly,' 'only takes a few minutes/seconds,' and 'anytime on desktop or mobile' emphasize ease, but not aggressively positioned as the primary value prop
messaging_analysis.security_messaging: Absent — no explicit trust, security, or safety messaging found in these ads
messaging_analysis.dominant_format: carousel — overwhelmingly the most common format (17 of 20 ads)
longest_running_themes: Seamless portfolio building across platforms (150+ days)
Crypto rewards card with boosted rates (60+ days)
messaging_analysis.summary: Crypto.com's ad strategy relies heavily on carousel formats to showcase ecosystem breadth rather than direct crypto buying. They lead with gamification rewards, social proof, and lifestyle benefits (rewards cards) while keeping purchase messaging soft and indirect. Long-running campaigns focus on portfolio building simplicity and automated trading features, with no emphasis on fees or security.
